  561  @1768884492:UTC     history_show() {
  562  @1769935568:UTC         local -a argv=($@);     local -i argc=${#argv[@]};     local -i index=0;     local -i current=0;     local -- arg="";     export HISTTIMEFORMAT='@%s:%Z     ';     local -A history_entries_by_entry_number=();     local -A history_timestamps_by_entry_number=();     local -a history_lines=();     local -i ifs_set=0;     local -- old_ifs="${IFS:-}";     local -a entry_numbers=();     if [[ -v IFS ]]; then         ifs_set=1;     fi;     export IFS=$'\n';     local -- line="";     history_lines=($(history));      for index in ${!argv[@]}; do         current=$(($index + 1));         arg="${argv[$index]}";         if [[ ! "${arg}" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then             1>&2 echo -e "[${FUNCNAME[0]} warning]" "argument ${current} of ${argc} invalid (not a number): ${arg@Q}";             continue;         fi;         entry_numbers+=("${arg}")
  563  @1769935568:UTC         done;     export IFS=$'|';     if [ ${#entry_numbers[@]} -eq 0 ]; then         entry_numbers=('[0-9]+');     fi;     local -- regexp="^\s*($(echo "${entry_numbers[*]}"))\s+(@([1-9][0-9]{9,}):([+-]?[0-9]+|[A-Z]+))\s+(.*)\$";      if (( $ifs_set )); then         export IFS="${old_ifs}";     else         unset IFS;     fi;     history | sed -n -E "/${regexp}/ T success q1; :success p";  }

 2684  @1769935568:UTC     ## emacs workbench functions
 2685  @1769935568:UTC     ### 1. function to set context
 2686  @1769935568:UTC     (defvar workbench-context-per-frame
 2687  @1769935568:UTC      \"property list where each key is a timestamp + pwd + buffer name (or filename) and the value is a string
 2688  @1769935568:UTC     \")
 2689  @1769935568:UTC     (defun workbench-set-context (description)
 2690  @1769935568:UTC        (interactive
 2691  @1769935568:UTC     (read-string \"describe what the current buffer is working on:\")))
 2692  @1769935568:UTC     workbench-set-context adds a key/value to workbench-context-per-frame based on current frame and buffer
 2693  @1769935568:UTC     #### 1.1. defadvice to ask for context every time a new frame is opened (.e.g.: \"C-x 5 2\")

 7641  @1768884492:UTC     history_show() {
 7642  @1769935569:UTC         local -a argv=($@);     local -i argc=${#argv[@]};     local -i index=0;     local -i current=0;     local -- arg="";     export HISTTIMEFORMAT='@%s:%Z     ';     local -A history_entries_by_entry_number=();     local -A history_timestamps_by_entry_number=();     local -a history_lines=();     local -i ifs_set=0;     local -- old_ifs="${IFS:-}";     local -a entry_numbers=();     if [[ -v IFS ]]; then         ifs_set=1;     fi;     export IFS=$'\n';     local -- line="";     history_lines=($(history));      for index in ${!argv[@]}; do         current=$(($index + 1));         arg="${argv[$index]}";         if [[ ! "${arg}" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then             1>&2 echo -e "[${FUNCNAME[0]} warning]" "argument ${current} of ${argc} invalid (not a number): ${arg@Q}";             continue;         fi;         entry_numbers+=("${arg}")
 7643  @1769935569:UTC         done;     export IFS=$'|';     if [ ${#entry_numbers[@]} -eq 0 ]; then         entry_numbers=('[0-9]+');     fi;     local -- regexp="^\s*($(echo "${entry_numbers[*]}"))\s+(@([1-9][0-9]{9,}):([+-]?[0-9]+|[A-Z]+))\s+(.*)\$";      if (( $ifs_set )); then         export IFS="${old_ifs}";     else         unset IFS;     fi;     history | sed -n -E "/${regexp}/ T success q1; :success p";  }
